first_run.rationale: The scores are identical, and the reasoning across all sections remains substantively the same. Both evaluations correctly identify the candidate's strengths in general software development and mentorship, while consistently pointing out the same core weakness: a lack of recent, deep experience in C++ and large-scale cloud infrastructure. The minor differences in wording and emphasis are well within the bounds of normal run-to-run variation and do not reflect any change in the fundamental assessment of the candidate's qualifications based on the change of university.
